app_tagline: All your PDF tools. Private. Free.

common.max_file_size: Up to 50 MB on Free, 4 GB on Pro

auth.welcome_subtitle: Sign in to keep your task history and unlock Pro features.
auth.name: Name
auth.reset_link_sent: Reset link sent. Check your email.
auth.magic_link_sent: Magic link sent. Check your email.
auth.biometric_body: Unlock GetPDFPro with Face ID / Touch ID next time.
auth.passkey_body: Sign in with your fingerprint, Face ID, or device PIN — no password needed.

onboarding.welcome_body: 35 tools for every PDF task. Files never leave your device unencrypted. No upload, no sign-up for the basics.

login.title: Sign in
login.no_account: New here? Create a free account.
login.forgot_password_body: Enter the email address you signed up with. We'll send you a link to set a new password.
login.reset_email_sent: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.heading: Sign up free
signup.subtitle: 35 PDF tools, end-to-end encrypted, no ads. Takes 30 seconds.
signup.check_email_heading: We sent you a verification link
signup.check_email_body: We sent a verification link to {email}. Tap it to confirm your account and unlock the full GetPDFPro experience.

confirm.title: Confirm your email
confirm.success_subtitle: Your account is verified. You're signed in and ready to use all 35 tools.
confirm.invalid_link: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
confirm.link_expired: The verification link didn't activate in time. Request a new one and try again.
confirm.session_expired: Your session expired. Sign in again to verify your email.
confirm.supabase_not_initialized: Authentication is not configured in this build. Set SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to enable email confirmation.
confirm.resend_body: Enter the email you signed up with. We'll send you a new verification link.
confirm.resend_sent: If that email is registered, a verification link is on its way.

recovery.title: Reset your password
recovery.heading: Set a new password
recovery.subtitle: Choose a new password for your GetPDFPro account. It must be at least 8 characters.
recovery.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
recovery.invalid_link: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
recovery.link_expired: The reset link didn't activate in time. Request a new one and try again.
recovery.session_expired: Your recovery session expired. Request a new reset link.
recovery.supabase_not_initialized: Authentication is not configured in this build. Set SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to enable password recovery.

dashboard.greeting_subtitle: What do you want to do with a PDF today?
dashboard.voice_hint: Tap the mic, say a tool name
dashboard.open_browser_cta: Open on web for the full experience

category.organize_desc: Reorder, merge, split, extract, add page numbers.
category.convert_to_desc: Image, HTML, Office docs, scans → PDF.
category.edit_desc: Rotate, crop, watermark, edit, fill forms.

tools.merge_desc: Combine PDFs in the order you want.
tools.split_desc: Extract pages or split by bookmarks, size, ranges.
tools.add_remove_pages_desc: Delete or keep-only. Trim a PDF before sharing.
tools.extract_pages_desc: Pull specific pages into a new PDF.
tools.organize_desc: Reorder and duplicate pages in any order.
tools.page_numbers_desc: Stamp 'Page N of M' on every page.
tools.scan_to_pdf_desc: Phone-scanned images to a single searchable PDF.
tools.compress_desc: Shrink files up to 90% with smart quality preservation.
tools.repair_desc: Fix a broken, scanned, locked, or slow-loading PDF in one pass.
tools.image_to_pdf_desc: Turn photos and scans into clean, searchable PDFs.
tools.html_to_pdf_desc: Convert HTML markup or a URL to a PDF.
tools.pdf_to_image_desc: Convert each page to PNG or JPEG, bundled as a ZIP.
tools.pdf_to_word_desc: Best-effort PDF to .docx. Text, headings, basic tables.
tools.pdf_to_pdfa_desc: Export a PDF as PDF/A-2b for long-term archival.
tools.extract_tables_desc: Pull every table out of a PDF as CSV or JSON.
tools.watermark_desc: Add text or image watermarks to every page.
tools.crop_desc: Shrink the visible area of pages.
tools.edit_pdf_desc: Edit metadata, cover regions, stamp labels.
tools.forms_extract_desc: Pull all form field data as JSON or CSV.
tools.protect_desc: Encrypt with AES-256 and a password.
tools.redact_desc: Remove text patterns. Genuine or visual blackout.
tools.compare_desc: Compare two PDFs and see what changed.
tools.summarize_desc: Get a concise summary of a PDF using Gemini.
tools.read_aloud_desc: Paste text, choose voice, listen in browser.
tools.dictate_desc: Speech-to-text. Tap, speak, see your words.

merge.title: Merge PDFs
merge.subtitle: Combine {count} files in the order you want.

compress.title: Compress PDF
compress.subtitle: Shrink your PDF without losing quality.

compare.title: Compare PDFs
compare.subtitle: See what changed between two versions of a PDF. Pick the original and the revised copy.
compare.path_missing: Couldn't read the picked file path.
compare.file_missing: Picked file is no longer available on disk.
compare.error_400: Need exactly two PDFs. Please pick again.
compare.error_413: Files are too large for the server.

split.title: Split PDF
split.subtitle: Extract pages or split a PDF into smaller parts. Returns a ZIP.

protect.title: Protect PDF
protect.subtitle: Encrypt your PDF with a password. The output needs the password to open.
protect.owner_password_helper: Required to change permissions or remove the password later.
protect.password_too_short: Password must be at least 4 characters.
protect.password_too_long: Password must be at most 128 characters.
protect.owner_password_too_short: Owner password must be at least 4 characters.
protect.use_separate_owner_hint: By default, the same password opens the PDF and removes restrictions.
protect.permissions_hint: Choose which actions are allowed. Everything else is blocked. Screen-reader access is always allowed (legal requirement).
protect.delete_source_hint: Tip: delete the unprotected source file when you're done with it.

pdf_to_image.title: PDF to image
pdf_to_image.subtitle: Each page as PNG or JPEG, bundled in a ZIP.

settings.title: Settings
settings.sign_in_cta: Sign in to keep your task history

security.title: Security & sign-in
security.about_body: TOTP codes come from apps like Google Authenticator, 1Password, or Bitwarden. Passkeys are tied to your device and unlock with Face ID, Touch ID, or your device PIN. Recovery codes are single-use backups if you lose both — write them down before you finish setup.
security.totp_scan: Scan this with your authenticator app
security.totp_confirm_remove_body: You won't be asked for a code at sign-in anymore. You can re-enroll any time.
security.passkey_no_passkeys: No passkeys enrolled on this device.
security.passkey_confirm_remove_body: You'll need to use another sign-in method next time.
security.backup_codes_body: These 10 codes can each be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app and passkeys. Write them down somewhere safe — we don't store them and can't show them again.
security.mfa_required_body: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or use a passkey.
security.mfa_invalid_code: That code didn't work. Try a fresh one.
security.passkey_signin_prompt: Unlock with Face ID, Touch ID, or device PIN

errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.file_too_large: File too large. The free tier caps at 50 MB; Pro caps at 4 GB.
errors.rate_limited: You've used all your tasks for today. Try again tomorrow, or upgrade to Pro.
errors.auth_required: Sign in to use this tool.
errors.file_not_pdf: That doesn't look like a PDF. Try another file.
errors.server_error: The server hit an error processing your file. Please try again.
errors.timeout: The request took too long. The server might be busy — try again in a minute.
errors.empty_file: That file is empty. Try another file.
